title: The Missed Appointment
content: Marcus only realized he had missed his dentist appointment after receiving a voicemail later that afternoon. Completely focused on work, he had forgotten to check his calendar during the busy morning. Feeling frustrated with himself, he immediately called the clinic to apologize and reschedule. Unfortunately, the next available appointment was several weeks away. For the rest of the day, Marcus kept thinking about how easily important responsibilities could disappear among meetings, deadlines, and notifications. That evening, he spent time organizing reminders and updating his schedule more carefully. Missing the appointment was inconvenient, but it also reminded him how important good organization had become in adult life.
